cli.app.help: OmniCAD — DAG-based CAD workflow orchestration engine.
cli.main.help: Enter interactive REPL when no subcommand is given; pass global options to subcommands.
cli.cmds.load.help: Parse, validate, and register one or more pipeline YAML files.
cli.cmds.load.paths.help: Path(s) to the pipeline YAML file(s) to load.
cli.err.load_failed: One or more files failed to load
cli.cmds.lint.help: Validate pipeline YAML syntax and DAG structure (no execution).
cli.cmds.lint.path.help: Path to the pipeline YAML file to validate.
cli.cmds.list.help: List registered pipelines (default) or run instances (--instance).
cli.cmds.start.help: Start one or more pipeline runs and block until complete.
cli.err.start_failed: One or more pipelines failed to start
cli.cmds.stop.ref.help: Instance ID of the pipeline run to abort.
cli.cmds.resume.help: Resume a FAILED (or PAUSED) pipeline instance and wait for completion.
cli.cmds.resume.ref.help: Instance ID of the pipeline run to resume.
cli.cmds.resume.opt_include_paused.help: Also resume tasks in PAUSED state.
cli.cmds.fix.help: Inject output (FIXED) or replace input (NEW) for a failed task.
cli.cmds.fix.ref.help: Instance ID of the pipeline run to fix.
cli.cmds.fix.opt_output.help: Path to inject as output.json (task transitions to FIXED).
cli.cmds.fix.opt_input.help: Path to inject as input.json (task resets to NEW).
cli.cmds.status.help: View the overall status and progress of a pipeline instance (JSON output).
cli.cmds.status.ref.help: Instance ID of the pipeline run to inspect.
cli.cmds.inspect.ref.help: Instance ID of the pipeline run to inspect.
cli.cmds.inspect.opt_step.help: Specify the step ID to inspect.
cli.cmds.inspect.opt_task.help: Specify the task ID to inspect (requires --step).
cli.cmds.log.help: View the run.log for a pipeline instance (JSON format, structured records).
cli.cmds.log.opt_offset.help: Start N lines from the end.
cli.cmds.serve.help: Start the pipeline engine as an HTTP REST API server (127.0.0.1 only, no auth).
cli.err.serve_deps_missing: Error: HTTP API dependencies not installed. Run: pip install pipeline_engine[api]
cli.err.serve_lock_conflict: Error: workspace '{ws}' is already locked by another serve process ({lock_path}).
repl.help.status: View pipeline instance status (--watch: live refresh)
repl.help.log: View run log (ERROR lines highlighted red)
repl.hint.tab_complete: Tip: press Tab to complete command names, pipeline IDs, instance IDs, step/task names, and paths.
repl.err.prompt_toolkit_missing: prompt_toolkit not installed — falling back to basic input mode.
repl.err.unknown_cmd_hint: type [cyan]help[/cyan] for a list of commands
repl.err.step_not_found: Step '{step_id}' does not exist in this run.
repl.err.task_not_found: Task '{task_id}' does not exist in step '{step_id}'.
repl.warn.exit_active_runs: {n} run(s) still active, they will be abandoned on exit.
repl.warn.flag_missing_value: {flag} missing value ('{value}' looks like another option)
repl.col.name: name
